heading: Switch to Role-Based Access for Your Encryption Key for a Project
body:
To create a new AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM role for accessing your AWS (Amazon Web Services) KMS keys for
encryption at rest, follow the [Set Up Unified AWS Access](set-up-unified-aws-access) procedure. If you have an existing
AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM role that you want to authorize, follow the [Set Up Unified AWS Access](set-up-unified-aws-access)
procedure.
